fixes_applied.original_issue: Path traversal via pluginId in install() and uninstall() — CWE-22
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added validatePluginId() that rejects IDs not matching /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$|^[a-z0-9]$/. Applied at entry of both install() and uninstall().

fixes_applied.original_issue: SSRF via model load/unload endpoints accepting arbitrary baseUrl — CWE-918
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Extracted isAllowedBaseUrl() helper (localhost + known provider domains). Applied to POST /models/load and /models/unload endpoints. Refactored GET /models to use the same helper.

fixes_applied.original_issue: ReDoS via template variable keys used in regex constructor — CWE-1333
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Replaced new RegExp() + .replace() with String.replaceAll() using literal placeholder strings. No regex involved.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unvalidated request body forwarding to Groq/Inworld TTS APIs — CWE-20
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Whitelist only expected fields (model, input, voice, response_format, speed for Groq; text, voice, output_spec for Inworld) before forwarding.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unbounded request body size for /voice/transcribe — CWE-770
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added Content-Length pre-check and post-read byteLength check against 25MB limit (matching Groq's limit).

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unchecked null dereference on inworldRes.body — CWE-476
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added explicit null check for inworldRes.body before calling getReader(), returns 502 if null.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Path traversal via pluginId in savePluginSettings — CWE-22
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added pluginId validation with same alphanumeric+hyphens regex. Throws StorageError on invalid ID.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Missing permission array validation in POST /plugins/:id/permissions/approve — CWE-20
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Imported VALID_PERMISSIONS from plugin types. Validates Array.isArray() and checks all entries against the known 15-permission set before passing to approveAndLoad().

fixes_applied.original_issue: No download size limit for plugin archives — CWE-400
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added 50MB limit: checks Content-Length header before download and verifies actual file size after download.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Path traversal via pluginId in discoverOne() — CWE-22
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added pluginId validation with same alphanumeric+hyphens regex at start of discoverOne().

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unbounded bulk operations (complete/delete/update) — CWE-770
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added Array.isArray() check and 500-item limit for ids array in all three bulk endpoints.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Error message information disclosure for 500 errors — CWE-209
fixes_applied.fix_applied: For 500 errors, return generic 'Internal server error' instead of raw error message. 400/404 errors still return specific messages.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Deserialization of untrusted toolCalls data from DB — CWE-502
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — data originates from local DB only (no external input). Adding Zod validation here adds complexity with minimal benefit in the single-user local-first model.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Local-first app with single-user DB. Risk is extremely low as data originates from the app itself. Full schema validation of chat history is architectural.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unbounded batch import — CWE-770
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — import endpoint uses same service layer as bulk ops. Adding a limit requires understanding typical import sizes. Covered by global body size limit suggestion.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Import sizes vary widely. A hard limit could break legitimate imports. Global body size middleware is the better fix.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Missing global request body size limit — CWE-770
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — Hono body-limit middleware requires configuration per-route for voice endpoints. Best done as a dedicated hardening pass.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires per-route configuration (voice endpoints need 25MB, others need 10MB). Better as a dedicated middleware setup task.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Insecure direct object reference for session endpoints — CWE-639
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — single-user local-first app by design. Multi-user auth is architectural.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Single-user local-first app. Auth is architectural and explicitly out of scope per project principles.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Chat message length unbounded — CWE-770
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — provider-side limits handle this naturally. Adding an arbitrary limit could break legitimate long messages.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Providers enforce their own token limits. Local-first app means no external abuse vector.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unrestricted plugin settings value — CWE-20
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — settings validation requires manifest introspection at runtime. Low risk in local-first context.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires loading and parsing plugin manifests at settings write time. Low risk since settings are local.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Plugin dir uses process.cwd() — CWE-426
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — existing pattern works correctly for all current deployment modes. Changing resolution strategy risks breaking existing installs.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Current behavior is correct for all deployment scenarios. Fix risks breaking existing plugin directories.

fixes_applied.original_issue: OAuth token stored without encryption — CWE-312
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — same as API key storage. At-rest encryption is an architectural feature.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: At-rest encryption for credentials is architectural. OAuth tokens have same risk profile as API keys which are also stored in plaintext.

summary: Fixed 12 of 20 security findings. Both CRITICAL issues resolved: path traversal in plugin installer/loader/markdown-backend via strict pluginId regex validation, and SSRF in AI model load/unload via isAllowedBaseUrl() helper. Fixed 7 WARNING-level issues: ReDoS in templates (switched to replaceAll), voice proxy body sanitization + size limits + null dereference, plugin permission validation, bulk operation limits, and error message disclosure. 8 SUGGESTION-level items deferred as they require architectural changes (auth, encryption, global middleware) inappropriate for the local-first single-user model.
